description: 将 AI PRD Creator 从纯英文应用改造为支持中英双语切换的国际化应用。UI 文本、AI 生成内容、SEO 元数据均支持中英文。

userStories.title: 安装 next-intl 并创建 i18n 基础设施
userStories.description: As a developer, I need i18n infrastructure installed so that subsequent stories can use translation functions.
acceptanceCriteria: Install next-intl as a project dependency (npm install next-intl)
Create src/i18n/config.ts with: supported locales array ['zh', 'en'], default locale 'zh', type definitions
Create src/locales/en.json with all namespaces pre-structured (header, wizard, form, settings, drafts, prdDisplay, viewer, refine, pwa, common) containing placeholder keys
Create src/locales/zh.json with matching structure, containing Chinese translations for all keys
Both JSON files must have identical key structures
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This is the foundation. All subsequent stories depend on the translation files and config existing.

userStories.title: 创建 LanguageProvider 和 useLanguage Hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a React context provider and hook so that components can access locale state and translation functions.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/i18n/language-provider.tsx as a 'use client' component
Export LanguageProvider component that wraps children with React Context
Export useLanguage() hook returning { locale: 'zh' | 'en', setLocale: (locale) => void, t: (key: string) => string }
t() function supports dot-notation nested keys like t('header.title') and returns the value from the current locale's JSON
On mount: read locale from localStorage key 'locale'; if not set, detect from navigator.language (zh* → 'zh', else → 'zh' as default fallback)
setLocale() saves to localStorage and updates React state
Wrap the app in LanguageProvider in src/app/layout.tsx (add 'use client' boundary if needed via a separate providers.tsx wrapper)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Depends on US-001 (translation files and config). The layout.tsx is a Server Component, so create a separate client providers.tsx wrapper.

userStories.title: 提取并翻译 Header 和 Footer 组件
userStories.description: As a user, I want the header navigation and footer to display in my selected language.
acceptanceCriteria: header.tsx: replace 'PRD CREATOR' with t('header.title')
header.tsx: replace 'Create professional PRDs instantly' with t('header.subtitle')
header.tsx: replace 'Saved PRDs' button text with t('header.savedPrds')
header.tsx: replace 'Settings' button text with t('header.settings')
footer.tsx: replace 'Powered by Gemini API...' with t('footer.poweredBy')
Both components use useLanguage() hook to get t() function
en.json header namespace: title='PRD CREATOR', subtitle='Create professional PRDs instantly', savedPrds='Saved PRDs', settings='Settings'
zh.json header namespace: title='PRD 生成器', subtitle='快速生成专业的产品需求文档', savedPrds='已保存', settings='设置'
en.json footer: poweredBy='Powered by Gemini API • Built for modern product teams'
zh.json footer: poweredBy='由 Gemini API 驱动 · 为现代产品团队打造'
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Depends on US-002 (useLanguage hook). Small focused story - only 2 files modified.

userStories.title: 提取并翻译 PRD Wizard 组件
userStories.description: As a user, I want the wizard step titles, descriptions, and navigation buttons to display in Chinese.
acceptanceCriteria: prd-wizard.tsx: replace all step titles - 'Idea Entry', 'Auto-fill & Edit', 'PRD Preview' with t() calls
prd-wizard.tsx: replace step descriptions - 'Describe your product idea', 'Review and customize details', 'Your generated document' with t() calls
prd-wizard.tsx: replace 'What's Your Product Idea?' heading with t() call
prd-wizard.tsx: replace the paragraph starting with 'Tell us about your product...' with t() call
prd-wizard.tsx: replace navigation buttons - 'Previous', 'Next', 'Start New Idea' with t() calls
prd-wizard.tsx: replace 'Step X of Y' format string with t('wizard.stepOf', { current, total })
prd-wizard.tsx: replace 'Currently Using:' and 'Your PRD is Ready!' with t() calls
prd-wizard.tsx: replace 'Product Idea' label and 'Add Visual Context (Optional)' with t() calls
prd-wizard.tsx: replace 'Error:' label with t() call
All keys added to wizard namespace in both en.json and zh.json
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Depends on US-002. This file has ~14 hardcoded strings. All within one file so it's one focused iteration.

userStories.title: 提取并翻译 PRD Form 组件（表单字段）
userStories.description: As a user, I want form labels, placeholders, and section headings to display in Chinese.
acceptanceCriteria: prd-form.tsx: replace all field labels - 'Product Name', 'Problem Statement', 'Target Audience', 'Proposed Solution', 'Core Features', 'Key Features', 'Business Goals', 'Success Metrics', 'Future Features', 'Tech Stack', 'Constraints' with t() calls
prd-form.tsx: replace all placeholder texts (e.g. 'e.g., A mobile app that helps...') with t() calls
prd-form.tsx: replace section headings from SECTION_FIELD_MAPPING if they are displayed ('1. Core Product Idea', '2. Audience & Market', etc.) with t() calls
prd-form.tsx: replace any error or hint messages with t() calls
All keys added to form namespace in both en.json and zh.json
Chinese translations use natural Chinese phrasing (e.g. 产品名称, 问题描述, 目标用户)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Depends on US-002. This file has ~29 hardcoded strings but follows a repetitive pattern (label → t() call).

userStories.title: 提取并翻译 Loader、Button 和通用组件
userStories.description: As a user, I want loading states and default button labels to display in Chinese.
acceptanceCriteria: loader.tsx: replace 'Generating your PRD...' with t('loader.generating') → zh: '正在生成 PRD...'
loader.tsx: replace 'The AI is thinking. This may take a moment.' with t('loader.thinking') → zh: 'AI 正在思考，请稍候。'
button.tsx: replace default loadingLabel 'Generating...' with a translated default using t('common.generating') → zh: '生成中...'
section.tsx: check for hardcoded text and translate if any exists
input-field.tsx: check for hardcoded text and translate if any exists
textarea-field.tsx: check for hardcoded text and translate if any exists
All keys added to common and loader namespaces in both en.json and zh.json
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Depends on US-002. These are small utility components with minimal text.

userStories.title: 提取并翻译 Settings Modal
userStories.description: As a user, I want the settings dialog to display in Chinese.
acceptanceCriteria: settings-modal.tsx: replace 'Settings' title with t('settings.title') → zh: '设置'
settings-modal.tsx: replace 'API Key' label with t('settings.apiKey') → zh: 'API 密钥'
settings-modal.tsx: replace 'Model' label with t('settings.model') → zh: '模型'
settings-modal.tsx: replace 'Save' button with t('settings.save') → zh: '保存'
settings-modal.tsx: replace 'Enter your Gemini API key' placeholder with t('settings.apiKeyPlaceholder') → zh: '输入您的 Gemini API 密钥'
settings-modal.tsx: replace 'Could not fetch models. Using default list.' error with t('settings.modelFetchError') → zh: '无法获取模型列表，使用默认列表。'
All keys added to settings namespace in both en.json and zh.json
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Depends on US-002. One file with ~6 text strings.

userStories.title: 提取并翻译 Saved Drafts Modal
userStories.description: As a user, I want the saved drafts dialog and date formatting to display in Chinese.
acceptanceCriteria: saved-drafts-modal.tsx: replace 'Saved PRDs' title with t('drafts.title') → zh: '已保存的 PRD'
saved-drafts-modal.tsx: replace 'Are you sure you want to delete this draft?' with t('drafts.deleteConfirm') → zh: '确定要删除此草稿吗？'
saved-drafts-modal.tsx: replace 'No saved drafts yet' with t('drafts.empty') → zh: '暂无已保存的 PRD'
saved-drafts-modal.tsx: replace 'Load' button with t('drafts.load') → zh: '加载'
saved-drafts-modal.tsx: replace 'Delete' button with t('drafts.delete') → zh: '删除'
saved-drafts-modal.tsx: change hardcoded 'en-US' date format locale to use current locale from useLanguage()
All keys added to drafts namespace in both en.json and zh.json
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Depends on US-002. Includes date format fix from hardcoded 'en-US' to dynamic locale.

userStories.title: 提取并翻译 PRD Display 和 Full Page Viewer
userStories.description: As a user, I want the PRD preview toolbar buttons and full-page viewer to display in Chinese.
acceptanceCriteria: prd-display.tsx: replace 'Copy to Clipboard' with t('prdDisplay.copy') → zh: '复制到剪贴板'
prd-display.tsx: replace 'Download' with t('prdDisplay.download') → zh: '下载'
prd-display.tsx: replace 'Save Draft' with t('prdDisplay.saveDraft') → zh: '保存草稿'
prd-display.tsx: replace 'View Full Page' with t('prdDisplay.viewFullPage') → zh: '全屏查看'
prd-display.tsx: replace 'Copied!' with t('prdDisplay.copied') → zh: '已复制！'
prd-display.tsx: replace 'Saved!' with t('prdDisplay.saved') → zh: '已保存！'
prd-display.tsx: replace 'Download PRD' with t('prdDisplay.downloadPrd') → zh: '下载 PRD'
full-page-prd-viewer.tsx: replace 'Full Page PRD Viewer' with t('viewer.title') → zh: 'PRD 全屏预览'
full-page-prd-viewer.tsx: replace 'Close' with t('viewer.close') → zh: '关闭'
full-page-prd-viewer.tsx: replace 'Copy' with t('viewer.copy') → zh: '复制'
full-page-prd-viewer.tsx: replace 'Download' with t('viewer.download') → zh: '下载'
All keys added to prdDisplay and viewer namespaces in both en.json and zh.json
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Depends on US-002. Two related files with ~11 text strings total.

userStories.title: 提取并翻译 Refine Modal 和 PWA Install Prompt
userStories.description: As a user, I want the refine dialog and PWA install prompt to display in Chinese.
acceptanceCriteria: refine-modal.tsx: identify and replace all hardcoded English text with t() calls
refine-modal.tsx: add keys to refine namespace in both en.json and zh.json
pwa-install-prompt.tsx: replace 'Install AI PRD Creator' with t('pwa.installTitle') → zh: '安装 AI PRD 生成器'
pwa-install-prompt.tsx: replace 'Install this app on your device for quick access and offline support' with t('pwa.installDesc') → zh: '将此应用安装到您的设备，快速访问并支持离线使用'
pwa-install-prompt.tsx: replace 'Install App' with t('pwa.installButton') → zh: '安装应用'
pwa-install-prompt.tsx: replace 'Maybe Later' with t('pwa.later') → zh: '以后再说'
All keys added to pwa namespace in both en.json and zh.json
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Depends on US-002. Two small components, ~6 text strings combined.

userStories.title: 创建语言切换器并集成到 Header + 翻译主页面文本
userStories.description: As a user, I want a visible language toggle in the header so I can switch between Chinese and English, and the main page setup text to display in my language.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/components/language-switcher.tsx as a 'use client' component
Displays two toggle buttons: '中' and 'EN' — current locale highlighted with accent background color
Styled with Neo-Brutalism: 2px border, box-shadow 2px 2px 0px, rounded-none
Clicking a language button calls setLocale() from useLanguage() hook
Integrate LanguageSwitcher into header.tsx, positioned between title area and action buttons (Saved PRDs, Settings)
page.tsx: replace 'Setup Required' heading with t('page.setupRequired') → zh: '需要配置'
page.tsx: replace 'Add your Gemini API key to start generating PRDs' with t('page.setupDesc') → zh: '添加您的 Gemini API 密钥以开始生成 PRD'
page.tsx: replace 'Configure API Key' button with t('page.configureKey') → zh: '配置 API 密钥'
All keys added to page namespace in both en.json and zh.json
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill — confirm toggle switches all visible text instantly
userStories.notes: Depends on US-002 and US-003 (Header already uses useLanguage). This is the first story where the user can SEE the language switch working end-to-end.

userStories.title: AI Prompt 国际化 - 修改 prompt builder 和 generate 路由
userStories.description: As a user, I want the AI to generate PRD content in Chinese when my UI is set to Chinese.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify src/lib/prd.ts: add optional locale parameter to buildGenerationPrompt() function signature
When locale === 'zh': append instruction 'Please write the entire PRD in Simplified Chinese (简体中文). All section titles, content, and descriptions must be in Chinese.' to the prompt
When locale === 'en' or undefined: keep existing English prompt unchanged (no modification)
Modify src/app/api/generate/route.ts: extract 'locale' from request body and pass to buildGenerationPrompt()
Add locale parameter to the frontend API call in prd-wizard.tsx for the generate endpoint
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Depends on US-004 (wizard already uses useLanguage). The prompt modification is minimal — just append a language instruction. Keep the existing prompt structure intact.

userStories.title: AI Prompt 国际化 - prefill 和 refine 路由 + 前端 locale 传递
userStories.description: As a user, I want AI auto-fill and refine features to also respect my language selection.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify src/app/api/prefill/route.ts: extract 'locale' from request body, pass locale instruction to the prefill prompt
When locale === 'zh': append 'Please respond in Simplified Chinese (简体中文).' to the prefill prompt
Modify src/app/api/refine/route.ts: extract 'locale' from request body, pass locale instruction to the refine prompt
When locale === 'zh': append 'Please respond in Simplified Chinese (简体中文).' to the refine prompt
Update frontend API calls in prd-wizard.tsx (or prd-form.tsx) for prefill endpoint to include current locale
Update frontend API call for refine endpoint (in refine-modal.tsx or wherever it's called) to include current locale
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Depends on US-012 (pattern established). Same approach: append language instruction to existing prompts.

userStories.title: SEO 元数据多语言动态更新
userStories.description: As a developer, I need page meta tags to reflect the user's selected language for proper SEO and social sharing.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a useDocumentMetadata hook or useEffect in a client component that updates document.title and meta tags based on locale
When locale === 'zh': title = 'AI PRD 生成器 - 专业 AI 产品需求文档生成工具', description = '将您的产品创意快速转化为专业的产品需求文档'
When locale === 'en': title = 'AI PRD Creator - Generate Professional PRDs Instantly', description = 'Turn your ideas into professional Product Requirements Documents instantly with AI'
Update OG meta tags (og:title, og:description) dynamically based on locale
Update Twitter card meta tags (twitter:title, twitter:description) dynamically based on locale
In layout.tsx: change hardcoded <html lang='en'> to use a client component that reads locale from LanguageProvider and sets document.documentElement.lang
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Depends on US-002 (LanguageProvider). Since we're not using URL-based routing, SEO is handled via client-side document.title and meta tag manipulation. Social crawlers will see the default (Chinese) since SSR uses the default locale.

userStories.title: API 错误消息翻译 + Offline 页面 + PWA Manifest
userStories.description: As a user, I want API error messages, the offline page, and PWA manifest to display in Chinese.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/api-messages.ts with a getErrorMessage(key, locale) helper that returns localized error messages
generate/route.ts: replace hardcoded error strings with getErrorMessage() calls, reading locale from request body
prefill/route.ts: replace hardcoded error strings with getErrorMessage() calls
refine/route.ts: replace hardcoded error strings with getErrorMessage() calls
models/route.ts: replace hardcoded error strings with getErrorMessage() calls
src/app/offline/page.tsx: wrap in LanguageProvider or use a standalone translation approach, replace all English text with Chinese equivalents
public/manifest.json: add 'description_zh' field or update description to include both languages
Frontend API calls: ensure all API calls include locale parameter so error messages come back in the right language
All API error message keys added to both en.json and zh.json
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Depends on US-002 and US-013 (API locale pattern). This is the cleanup story — error messages, offline page, and manifest are the last remaining English text.
